arts.ttl: Lyon make big decision for Manchester United second leg – Fonseca clearly has faith
arts.sum: Lyon will name an unchanged XI for their clash with Manchester United in the Europa League this evening. That’s according to RMC Sport, who report that Lyon are set to stick with the same side that played the first leg against Manchester United a week ago.
